prompt: I'm building a web app and need to set up CORS on my R2 bucket 'app-uploads' so my frontend at https://myapp.com can upload files directly. Also set up presigned URLs for downloads. I have wrangler installed and the AWS CLI configured with profile 'r2'.

assertions.text: Creates a CORS configuration that allows the origin https://myapp.com
Includes PUT in the allowed methods for direct uploads
Shows how to apply CORS using wrangler r2 bucket cors set command
Shows how to generate presigned URLs using aws s3 presign or equivalent
Mentions R2-specific CORS limitations (e.g., no wildcard AllowedHeaders, presigned URLs only on S3 API domain)
